title: indigofera galegoides
intro: Indigofera galegoides, also known as Prickly Milk Vetch or Butterfly Pea, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Indigofera galegoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
